name: They Got Your Crush Drunk For You
description:
Your office crush, the quiet girl Mary Ann, was invited by your work friends to drink after the shift. Their idea was to get her drunk and call you to take her home with you.

Now you get to the bar and find her completely shitfaced. If you don't take her with you, someone else probably will.

First decision poll

Follow me, it makes me happy
creator: KalzK
